description: convertQuoteToSalesOrder service path: accepted quote's product one-time lines become a draft sales_order with lines (qty, unit price, service_id) and sales_orders.quote_id set

Quote conversion dialog offers 'Create sales order for product lines' when the quote has product one-time lines; when chosen, those lines are excluded from the draft-invoice conversion (no double-billing)
Sales orders created from quotes default invoice_mode='on_fulfillment'
Migration: sales_orders.quote_id uuid nullable, tenant-qualified FK to quotes, indexed
getProductAvailability(serviceIds[]) read action: per product on-hand total, available (on-hand minus open allocations), reorder point, per-location breakdown for tracked products
Quote form/detail product lines show advisory availability chip (on-hand/available) for tracked products via getProductAvailability
Sales order creation UI uses the house ClientPicker (@alga-psa/ui) instead of a raw client UUID text input
SO detail: client name renders as a link to /msp/clients/{client_id}
SO detail: lists invoices generated from this SO (via invoice_charges.so_line_id backlink) with links to the invoice screen
SO detail: shows source quote link when quote_id is set; quote detail shows converted-SO link
Material picker search returns track_stock, on_hand_total, reorder_point per product (canonical picker search action extended)
Ticket material picker rows show on-hand badge for tracked products: normal count, amber at/below reorder point, red at zero
After product selection in the ticket materials card, per-location on-hand is shown (tech's default/van location first)
recordStockConsumption blocks insufficient non-serialized tracked stock inside the existing row lock; error names the available quantity; exact-to-zero allowed
Guard applies only to the consumption path: adjustments, cycle counts, receiving, and reversal paths remain unrestricted
Project materials drawer shows the same on-hand badges/location display as the ticket picker
Ticket Materials card auto-expands when the ticket already has materials (stays collapsed only when empty)
Insufficient-stock block surfaces as a clear inline error in the add-material form (not a silent failure or generic toast)
listClientSalesOrders(clientId) read action: SOs for the client with status, totals, dates
listClientEquipment(clientId) read action: delivered/owned stock_units with product name, SKU, serial, MAC, delivery date, linked asset_id
listClientRmas(clientId) read action: RMAs for the client with status and unit/product context
Client detail gains an Equipment tab with three sections (Sales Orders / Equipment / RMAs), rows deep-linking to SO detail, asset detail, and RMA screens
Equipment tab hidden without inventory:read permission
getAssetInventoryProvenance(assetId) read action: product (service_id/name/SKU), stock unit serial, origin sales order (unit→fulfillment→SO walk), RMA history for the unit/asset
Asset detail shows an inventory provenance section (product/SKU, origin SO link, RMA history) when the asset has stock_unit_id/service_id links; absent otherwise
Migration: product_inventory_settings.default_asset_type text nullable; createAndLinkDeliveredAsset uses it for asset_type with fallback 'unknown'
Product inventory settings UI exposes a default asset type select

Event schemas: INVENTORY_STOCK_LOW, INVENTORY_PO_RECEIVED, INVENTORY_SO_FULFILLED, INVENTORY_RMA_CREATED added to packages/event-schemas eventBusSchema with typed payloads (tenant, ids, names, quantities)
Migration: event_catalog seed rows for the 4 inventory event types so the workflow engine can trigger on them
INVENTORY_PO_RECEIVED emitted post-commit on PO receiving
INVENTORY_SO_FULFILLED emitted post-commit on fulfillment including drop-ship confirmation
INVENTORY_RMA_CREATED emitted post-commit on RMA creation
INVENTORY_STOCK_LOW emitted edge-triggered when consumption/fulfillment crosses the reorder point downward (not re-emitted while remaining below)

Migration: 'inventory-po-received' internal-notification subtype (+translations) under the EXISTING 'inventory' category — category, low-stock subtype, templates, and daily low-stock digest already shipped in 20260701091000

Internal notifications from INVENTORY_PO_RECEIVED via the eventBus subscriber idiom respecting per-user subtype preferences; low-stock notifications stay with the existing daily digest job (INVENTORY_STOCK_LOW feeds workflows only)
SEARCH_OBJECT_TYPES + indexers added for sales_order, purchase_order, stock_unit (serial and MAC searchable) following existing indexer patterns
searchIndexSubscriber OBJECT_ID_FIELDS wired for the 3 new types; SO/PO/stock-unit create/update/delete paths emit the events that drive (re)indexing
Global search results render and deep-link the 3 new types (SO detail, PO screen, stock unit's product/asset)
getInvoiceLineCogs(invoiceId) read action: per-line COGS from stock_movements joined via so_line_id/material backlinks, with margin computed against the line amount
Internal invoice line view shows a sales-order link on lines carrying so_line_id
Internal invoice line view shows per-line COGS and margin where COGS data exists; never rendered on customer-facing PDF/portal output
Existing marginReport action wired into a Margin report UI (per-service revenue, COGS, margin, filterable by period)
Central Reports catalog gains an 'inventory' category listing the Margin report (and links to existing write-offs/ghost-usage screens)
Contract profitability report includes hardware COGS (ticket/project materials + SO lines via stock_movements cogs_cost) alongside labor cost
accountingExportService supports export_type 'vendor_bill' (generic engine plumbing: batch creation, status tracking, idempotency)
QBO adapter exports vendor bills: vendor matched by name with create-if-missing, lines mapped to a default expense account, bill number/date/amounts carried
Vendor bills screen: 'Export to accounting' action with per-bill exported status badge
Canonical materials service in packages/inventory (add/list/delete for ticket and project materials) owning stock consumption, serialized unit handling, validation, and reversal
Tickets UI actions, projects UI actions, and billing materialActions delegate to the canonical service (triplication removed; import sites unchanged via re-export)
Permission gating enforced in the canonical path with billing-parity semantics; tickets/projects UI copies no longer bypass hasPermission

REST API TicketService.addTicketMaterial delegates to the canonical service: stock consumed for tracked products, serialized products accept/require stock_unit_id, validation errors consistent with UI path
REST API material delete parity — VERIFIED N/A: the public API exposes GET/POST materials only (no DELETE endpoint); adding one is out of scope (API-surface non-goal)
Vendor actions enforce seeded vendor:* permissions
Transfer actions enforce seeded stock_transfer:* permissions
Location actions enforce seeded stock_location:* permissions (coexisting with the van-ownership checks in scope.ts)
Materials-triplication LEVERAGE debt resolved: single implementation, no duplicated add/delete/consume wiring greppable across tickets/projects/billing
